title: knowltonia crassifolia
intro: Knowltonia crassifolia, also known as the small yellow passion flower, is a species of flowering plant in the passionflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Knowltonia crassifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
